text: Iran continues to mock Trump: We are writing to you from the Stone Age and we control the Strait of Hormuz.

🇷🇺 👍 🇮🇷 🤝 🇺🇸 / 🇷🇺 - 🇭🇺 : Dimitry Peskov: The Kremlin has welcomed the news of a ceasefire between the US and Iran and approves of the decision to avoid further armed escalation. 💬 The Kremlin hopes that direct contacts between the US and Iran will take place in the coming days. He also touched on the internet and VPN related issues inside Russian Federation and the upcoming Hungarian parliamentary elections and foreign meddling in them. Key points: ➡️ The Kremlin has always stressed the need to move the escalation in the Middle East onto a diplomatic track as quickly as possible; ➡️ Russia expects the US and Iran to defend their interests at the negotiating table; ➡️ The Kremlin hopes that American negotiators will soon have more time to focus on resolving the Ukraine conflict; ➡️ Russia greatly values Trump’s peacekeeping efforts and those of the US negotiating team on the Ukraine track; ➡️ The Ukraine and Iran settlement processes are only indirectly linked; ➡️ Russian agencies are working to restore normal internet operations; ➡️ Conclusions about internet restrictions and VPN usage in Russia should be left to experts; ➡️ Nothing in the published transcript of the Putin–Orbán call could harm Russian-Hungarian relations; ➡️ The published transcript can be seen as material supporting the Hungarian Prime Minister; ➡️ The transcript shows Orbán as a pragmatic politician protecting his country’s interests; ➡️ Many forces in the EU and Brussels would rather not see Orbán win another election and are backing his opponents. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

🟡 Statement issued by Hezbollah: To the noblest of people... To the people of the patient, steadfast, and sacrificing resistance... To the people of the steadfast South, the towering Bekaa, and the proud Dahiyeh... We stand today at the threshold of a great historic victory, which will be achieved thanks to the sacrifices of the mujahideen, the blood of the martyrs, and your unparalleled steadfastness and patience... We call upon you in these decisive moments to exercise even more patience, steadfastness, and waiting, and not to head to the villages, towns, and targeted areas in the South, the Bekaa, and the Southern Suburb of Beirut until the official final ceasefire declaration in Lebanon is issued. This is because the treacherous and barbaric enemy, which is seeking to escape from the image of its defeat, may resort to treacherous attempts to create an illusionary scene suggesting it has achieved something it could not attain on the ground. God willing, you will soon return to your villages and homes with heads held high, proud, dignified, victorious — just as you have always been.

🇮🇷 ⚔️ 🇦🇪 An oil refinery on Iran’s Lavan Island was attacked this morning, the National Iranian Oil Refining and Distribution Company confirmed. No casualties have been reported. The attack reportedly originated from the UAE, and it appears that Iran has already retaliated. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
Strikes hit an Iranian oil refinery on Lavan Island today. Iran is now retaliating with strikes on targets in Kuwait, Bahrain, and the UAE.

Faytuks News Breaking: Kuwait's military says it has interepted 28 Iranian drones since the morning hours بيان رقم ( 55) صادر عن المتحدث الرسمي لوزارة الدفاع العقيد الركن سعود عبدالعزيز العطوان تتعامل الدفاعات الجوية الكويتية منذ الساعة الثامنة من صباح اليوم ولغاية الآن، لموجة مكثفة من الهجمات الإيرانية المعادية الآثمة، حيث تم التعامل مع عدد (28) طائرة مسيّرة، استهدفت دولة الكويت. وتمكنت القوات المسلحة الكويتية من اعتراض عدد كبير من الطائرات المسيّرة المعادية التي استهدفت بعضها منشآت نفطية حيوية ومحطات للطاقة جنوب البلاد، ما أسفر عن أضرار مادية جسيمة في مرافق البنية التحتية النفطية ومحطات القوى الكهربائية وتقطير المياه. وتؤكد رئاسة الأركان العامة للجيش بذل كافة جهود الرصد والتصدي لهذه الاستهدافات الغاشمة. حفظ الله #الكويت آمنةً مطمئنة. #الجيش_الكويتي - KUWAIT ARMY - الجيش الكويتي tweet

Horowitz "ceasefire" Kuwait military: "The Kuwaiti air defenses have been dealing, since 8:00 a.m. today and up to now, with an intense wave of hostile Iranian criminal attacks, where a total of (28) drones were intercepted that targeted the State of Kuwait. The Kuwaiti Armed Forces succeeded in intercepting a large number of hostile drones, some of which targeted vital oil facilities and power stations in the south of the country, resulting in significant material damage to oil infrastructure facilities, power stations, and water desalination plants. The General Staff of the Army affirms its commitment to all efforts of monitoring and confronting these treacherous targeting attempts.' tweet

Türkiye is in active talks with Italy to purchase and co-produce the SAMP/T air defense system, developed by the Eurosam consortium (with MBDA and Thales Group). This system can defend against aircraft, drones, cruise missiles, and some ballistic missiles, especially with the newer SAMP/T NG version using Aster 30 missiles. Source: Bloomberg

🇺🇦 The Russian Armed Forces have struck a refinery in the Kharkov region - the company has suffered significant losses, according to Ukrainian media. The plant wants to resume operations but they are having trouble saying when they will be able to do so. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

Spain has called Israel’s continued attacks in Lebanon “unacceptable,” despite a recent U.S.–Iran two-week ceasefire. Foreign Minister José Manuel Albares said all fronts, including Lebanon, must stop.
Pope Leo welcomes the truce in Iran as a “sign of great hope.”

Even close Trump allies didn’t know what he would do. Multiple insiders believed he would reject the ceasefire offer — until he suddenly accepted it. Inside the Pentagon, officials were preparing for a massive bombing campaign. One defense official said: “We had no idea what was going to happen. It was wild.” Allies expected large-scale Iranian retaliation. Source: Axios

Just hours before Trump’s deadline to launch massive strikes, Iran’s Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei instructed negotiators to move toward a deal for the first time since the war began. An Israeli official, a regional official, and another source confirmed the shift. Two sources described Khamenei’s approval as: “A breakthrough.” A regional source added: “Without his green light, there wouldn’t have been a deal.” Due to assassination threats, Khamenei was communicating via handwritten notes carried by runners. He was personally involved in decisions Monday and Tuesday. Araghchi (Iran’s FM) pushed both the negotiations and Revolutionary Guard commanders toward accepting the deal. Source: Axios

Iran’s Farsi version of its 10-point ceasefire plan includes “acceptance of enrichment” for its nuclear program—a phrase missing from the English version shared with journalists. The reason for the discrepancy is unclear. Source: AP
🇶🇦 💬 🇮🇷 Qatar’s Foreign Ministry: Iran must compensate Qatar for all damages caused by the Iranian attacks. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

U.S. Envoy Steve Witkoff reacted furiously to Iran’s 10-point proposal, calling it: “A disaster, a catastrophe.” What followed was described as a: “Chaotic” day of amendments. Pakistan shuttled drafts between the U.S. and Iran, while Egypt and Türkiye tried to bridge gaps. China also quietly urged Iran to find an off-ramp. By Monday night, U.S. approval was secured for a revised two-week ceasefire proposal. Source: Axios
🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Trump on Iran's conditions to Sky News: They’re not the maximalist demands Iran is claiming. If it isn’t good, we’ll go right back to it very easily. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

Trump to Sky News: You don’t know what the points are. I know what they are. They’re very good points — and most of them have been fully negotiated. They’re not the maximalist demands Iran is claiming. If it isn’t good, we’ll go right back to it very easily.
Zelensky: Ukrainian military experts will continue their work in the Middle East.
Qatar’s Foreign Ministry: Iran must compensate Qatar for all damages caused by the Iranian attacks.

🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 IRGC Intelligence in Semnan: Arrest of 2 Mossad Agents in Semnan Two spies linked to Israel's Mossad were identified and arrested through complex intelligence operations. The suspects had repeatedly contacted a Mossad officer since the 12-day war, sending them information about sensitive sites in the province. They were recruited via foreign social networks and opposition channels.

He promised a historic victory and security for generations, and in practice, we got one of the most severe strategic failures Israel has ever known.
